articles.title: IPL 2026: Shreyas Iyer wanted to be the one to make a difference
articles.description: PBKS assistant coach Brad Haddin lauded skipper Shreyas Iyer's unbeaten 101 in the win against LSG, stating the captain 'wanted to be the one who made the difference'. The victory keeps Punjab's IPL 2026 playoff hopes alive.

articles.title: IPL 2026: Cheerleader Targeted By Spectator Throwing Phone Number During LSG vs PBKS Clash (WATCH)
articles.description: During the IPL 2026 match between LSG and PBKS, a spectator harassed a cheerleader by throwing a paper ball with his phone number at her. The incident, captured in a viral video, prompted immediate police action and sparked outrage on social media, with many condemning the fan's behaviour.

articles.title: IPL: PBKS skipper Shreyas Iyer joins elite list with run-chase century
articles.description: Shreyas Iyer became the fourth captain to score a century in an IPL run-chase, hitting 101* for PBKS against LSG. He joins Sehwag, Kohli, and Samson in the elite list. Iyer also surpassed 7,000 T20 runs during his match-winning knock.

articles.title: Jayawardene breaks silence on Jasprit Bumrah's difficult IPL 2026 campaign
articles.description: Jayawardene disclosed that Bumrah entered the IPL while still recovering from a niggle suffered during India's victorious T20 World Cup campaign.

articles.title: Premier League relegation ‚ÄĒ Who are relegated when who of Tottenham, West Ham will drop?
articles.description: Tottenham Hotspur and West Ham United are the only two teams in contention for relegation on the final matchday, with Wolves and Burnley already relegated.

articles.title: Indianapolis weather forecast: What time is the Indy 500, where to watch Indianapolis 500? Start time, channel, live streaming details
articles.description: Indy 500: Four-time IndyCar Indianapolis 500 champion Alex Palou is the defending race winner.
